prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Pontiac 455 Super Duty (SD-455)** block (casting #500557) with forged internals: Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (3.75" stroke), Eagle H-beam connecting rods (6.800" length), and JE forged pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio) for 600+ HP on 93 octane. Pair with a **Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle body system** (PN: 550-511K) and **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H camshaft** (0.520" lift, 244° duration @ 0.050") for aggressive mid-range torque.

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV**. Custom 3" stainless steel exhaust with **Flowmaster Super 44 Delta Flow mufflers** (PN: 817608) and **Pacesetter headers** (1.75" primary tubes, 3" collectors) for optimized scavenging.

Suspension overhaul with **Hotchkis Sport Suspension Stage 2 kit** (PN: 22102) featuring 1.25" front and 1" rear sway bars, **Bilstein B8 shocks** (PN: 24-186742), and **Global West Negative Roll front upper control arms** (PN: GWS-101) to correct camber and improve cornering. Rear end reinforced with **Currie Enterprises 9" Ford housing** (PN: CE-9F) and **Eaton TrueTrac differential** (3.73:1 gear ratio) for drag strip launches.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit** (PN: RB-WB-67CAT) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and **VMR V710 18x10.5" wheels** (ET+15 offset) wrapped in **Nitto NT05R 295/40R18 tires**. Front fenders rolled and pulled for clearance, with **BMR subframe connectors** (PN: SFC017) to stiffen the chassis.

Custom **Pontiac-specific front splitter** from **Aeroflow Dynamics** (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) paired with a **DTM-style rear diffuser** (aluminum, 5" height) and **Maxton Design GT-style side skirts**. **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (PN: 42001) with **Diode Dynamics SS3 sequential turn signals** (PN: DD-315330) for modern lighting.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro SRD seats** (PN: 391.91.500) in black Alcantara with **Pontiac Gold stitching**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (380mm, suede), and **Rolls-Royce-style toggle switches** for auxiliary controls. **Defi BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**.
